metadata.description: Free Claude Code plugins from Alex Tong — skills for AI-assisted development and printable educational worksheets.

plugins.name: pr-summary-generator
plugins.description: Generate structured PR descriptions from the current branch diff — built for AI-assisted development where the PR body is the primary review artifact.

plugins.name: worksheet-maker
plugins.description: Create beautiful, printable educational worksheets as self-contained HTML files — for any grade level, subject, or audience. Primary use case: teaching software engineering and tech concepts.

plugins.name: claude-md-audit
plugins.description: Audit CLAUDE.md files for staleness, contradictions, and missing context — scores each file and produces a fix-it checklist.

plugins.name: workspace
plugins.description: Create team workspaces with shared context across multiple repos — generates repo registry, CLAUDE.md scaffold, Makefile, and bootstrap scripts.
